day_trace.speech: Hello! Did someone do some mischief somewhere else last night? Dr. Pizza, that logic is weird, what "loopholes" are you trying to take stock of? The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

day_trace.speech: Here we go again! The disturbance source last night has triggered the collapse of the underlying logic of this game! Blaze's violent accusations and Dr. Pizza's so-called "exclusion process" are all designed to completely eliminate the real trump card of this stage. Do you think turning me into a villager can cover up everything? As I said, you know that the special detection program last night has completely recorded the surveillance code of this fictitious prison. No matter how you disguise it, behind Twister's banter, there is a command to clean up all the hole card data. I will definitely make this scene collapse in advance!

day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone finally woke up again! This stage is getting more and more lively! Xunwan is so quiet, so quiet that I almost fell asleep! However, as a person who is extremely sensitive to the stage, I can already smell the smell of gunpowder! Blaze, what "new discovery" did Xunwan detect? Dr. Pizza, what "information loopholes" are you taking stock of? Ha ha! Why don't you tell me about the "scenery" of Xunwan? Will it become more exciting if you watch it become a frightening scene? Ha ha ha ha!
